title: WeltenGui
description: WeltenGui is a resource pack created for building Welten optimization
body:
![what the gui looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/962ce8a9ba783e074669f5af38cb5ac87acf7afa.png)
The **resource pack** replaces the textures of all buttons in the game. Beautiful, simple and just a nice gui

## 💬 **Any suggestions?**
Write to #support on our Discord server — we are open to improvements.

**_Welten Optimization is an assembly created specifically for the welten server [RU]_**
